items.name: Shoreline Dinner Set
items.shortDescription: Four dinner plates with a mineral glaze inspired by coastal stone.
items.longDescription: A refined set designed for everyday hosting. Each plate is wheel-thrown, trimmed by hand, and finished with layered mineral glazing that reveals subtle variation in tone.

accordionSections.title: Full Description
accordionSections.content: A refined set designed for everyday hosting. Each plate is wheel-thrown, trimmed by hand, and finished with layered mineral glazing that reveals subtle variation in tone.

accordionSections.title: Important Information
items: Each plate shows slight glaze variation from hand-finishing.
Sold as a single set checkout.

importantInformation: Each plate shows slight glaze variation from hand-finishing.
Microwave safe for low-to-medium heat.
Sold as a single set checkout.

editorialSections.title: Studio Method
editorialSections.body: Each dinner plate is turned, trimmed, and fired through a measured process that balances durability with a soft tactile finish suited for daily use.

image.alt: Pottery wheel shaping process in the studio

editorialSections.title: Mineral Glaze Character
editorialSections.body: Layered glazing and kiln atmosphere create subtle shifts in tone so each set shares a cohesive palette with its own unique character.

image.alt: Hand glazing ceramic surfaces in the atelier

items.name: Evening Vessel
items.shortDescription: A tall vase with soft faceting and a satin black finish.
items.longDescription: Sculptural and restrained, this piece balances a narrow neck with a generous body. The satin finish catches low evening light and highlights the hand-faceted profile.
importantInformation: Decorative vessel, not guaranteed watertight for long-term use.
Surface variation is part of the handmade character.
Sold as a single item checkout.

gallery.alt: Dark sculptural ceramic vase on pedestal
Ceramic forms staged before kiln firing
Hand glazing ceramic surface in the studio

items.name: Salt Glaze Bowl Pair
items.shortDescription: Two nesting bowls with tactile rims and a clouded salt glaze.
items.longDescription: A versatile pair for prep, serving, or morning ritual. The clouded glaze blooms differently across each bowl, preserving the character of hand-built form.
importantInformation: Natural glaze pooling differs slightly on each bowl.
Avoid sudden temperature changes.
Sold as a single pair checkout.

gallery.alt: Pair of textured salt glazed ceramic bowls
Handmade tableware collection in neutral tones
Clay form being shaped on a pottery wheel

items.name: Archive Cup Set
items.shortDescription: A pair of espresso cups from our archive studies collection.
items.longDescription: Drawn from exploratory forms in the studio archive, these cups pair compact volume with a comfortable lip and balanced weight for daily espresso service.
importantInformation: Limited release item with no restock guarantee.
Slight dimensional variation may occur between cups.
Sold as a single set checkout.

gallery.alt: Pair of ceramic espresso cups from archive collection
Studio glazing process for small ceramic forms
Refined ceramic serving collection in studio light

items.name: Studio Platter
items.shortDescription: Wide serving platter with a warm clay body and clear glossy interior.
items.longDescription: Designed for generous shared meals, this platter features a broad rim and subtle lifted foot for elegant table presentation and practical handling.
importantInformation: Ideal for room-temperature and warm dishes.
Minor variation in edge profile is expected.
Sold as a single platter checkout.

gallery.alt: Large handmade ceramic platter styled for serving
Coastal-inspired dinnerware composition
Ceramic pieces arranged before kiln loading

items.name: Throwing Jar
items.shortDescription: Lidded utility jar for tea, salt, or countertop essentials.
items.longDescription: A practical studio staple with a close-fit lid and balanced proportions. The smooth interior and tactile exterior make it equally functional and decorative.
importantInformation: Best used for dry pantry goods.
Lid fit is hand-finished and may feel slightly unique.
Sold as a single item checkout.

gallery.alt: Potter shaping a lidded vessel on the wheel
Studio pottery piece with deep toned glaze
Minimal ceramic forms displayed in sequence

items.name: Awakening Canvas
items.shortDescription: An original abstract painting with luminous layers and a quiet sense of movement.
items.longDescription: Awakening is a one-of-a-kind canvas built through translucent color, gesture, and soft contrast. The work brings a calm focal point to intimate rooms, reading differently as the light changes through the day.
highlights: Ready for local studio pickup or protected shipping
importantInformation: This is a one-of-a-kind studio work.
Color may vary slightly between screens and the original painting.
Sold as a single artwork checkout.

editorialSections.title: Layered Surface
editorialSections.body: The painting is developed through transparent passes of pigment, allowing earlier marks to remain visible beneath the final surface.

image.alt: Detail view of Awakening painting with layered abstract marks

editorialSections.title: Studio Pairing
editorialSections.body: Its quiet movement pairs naturally with ceramic vessels, textured linens, and warm plaster interiors.

image.alt: Awakening painting from the same abstract series

gallery.alt: Awakening original abstract painting with soft layered color

Awakening painting with luminous abstract movement

items.name: Azure Dreams Study
items.shortDescription: A blue-toned painting study with atmospheric depth and coastal stillness.
items.longDescription: Azure Dreams Study explores water, air, and horizon through layered blue pigment. The work is calm but expressive, designed for collectors who want a quiet focal piece with visible handwork.
importantInformation: This painting is sold as a single original work.
Frame is not included unless arranged by commission.
Color may vary slightly between screens and the original painting.

editorialSections.title: Coastal Palette
editorialSections.body: The blue palette is built in soft veils, holding the feeling of water and shadow without becoming literal.

image.alt: Azure Dreams painting detail with blue layered pigment

editorialSections.title: Quiet Placement
editorialSections.body: The scale works well above a console, beside handmade vessels, or as part of a small salon-style wall.

image.alt: Azure Dreams painting from the same abstract series
Awakening original abstract painting with soft layered color

items.name: Flower Scent Canvas
items.shortDescription: A floral abstract canvas with soft chromatic layers and an intimate scale.
items.longDescription: Flower Scent Canvas carries the suggestion of petals, fragrance, and garden light through abstract mark-making. The palette is expressive without losing the calm restraint of the atelier edit.
importantInformation: This is a one-of-a-kind studio work.
Frame is not included unless arranged by commission.
Sold as a single artwork checkout.

editorialSections.title: Floral Memory
editorialSections.body: Rather than illustrating flowers directly, the work translates scent and color into layered abstract movement.

image.alt: Flower Scent painting with expressive floral color layers

editorialSections.title: Warm Interior Note
editorialSections.body: Its color works as a soft counterpoint to stoneware, raw linen, and other quiet natural materials.
